_README: Durable manual-override layer for the Baker thesis-scoring pipeline. Applied AFTER clustering + basket resolution, immediately BEFORE returns, by theme_returns_v2.py and build_repeat_mention_events.py. Survives rebuilds; overrides win over clustering. Match keys: theme, date, mention_number, summary_contains (str|list, all substrings, case-insensitive). Thesis/date-specific entries are listed before theme-level catch-alls so the specific one wins (first match).

cluster_overrides.note: TPU mention 5 (GLM 5.2 distillation) is misclustered — it is a China-distillation thesis, not a TPU-competitiveness thesis. Move to China theme (already double-clustered there).

event_overrides.note: Nov-2021 Starlink-disruption thesis names VSAT/SATS/LUMN as victims. Only this SpaceX row; others keep retail proxy / NO_BASKET.
Sohn Montreal 2025-05-28: 'reasoning drives HBM demand' -> MU.
Flywheel theses (reasoning creates a data flywheel for scaled model cos; beneficiaries OpenAI/Anthropic/xAI/Google) -> GOOGL (public proxy).
2020-05-07 edge-computing-in-retail thesis is misclustered into power -> NO_BASKET. Only that row.
Intel mention 1 (2019-11-26) is a TSMC-beat-Intel structural observation, not an Intel long -> NO_BASKET. Mentions 2/3 keep INTC LONG (default).
TPU mention 4 (2026-05-20): genuine reversal — Google lost per-cost-token leadership. Tag thesis-close, exclude from long-mention scoring. Mentions 1-3 keep GOOGL LONG.
All mentions. NVDA/MIXED was wrong (NVDA loses China revenue). Thesis = Western semicap-equipment monopolies protected by export controls.
All mentions. PAIR_TRADE: long NVDA+GOOGL / short AVGO. No returns computed.
All mentions. He named the incumbents (T/VZ/TMUS) as 5G cost-treadmill victims -> SHORT.
All mentions. RBLX removed — not public until 2021-03-10, cannot anchor 2020 returns.
All mentions. He named both CoreWeave and Nebius at Sohn NY 2026.
Both mentions -> NO_BASKET. Neither is a trade rec; the Dec-2024 row is really an xAI thesis.
Both mentions (2026-06-11, 2026-06-15) -> NO_BASKET + is_derisk_signal. Verbal exposure-reduction signal front-running the Q2 2026 filing.
